title: TLS 1.0 enabled — deprecated protocol version
description: The server accepts TLS 1.0 connections, which is a deprecated protocol version susceptible to multiple attacks including BEAST and POODLE. The server also supports weak cipher suites (TLS_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA) that do not provide forward secrecy.
remediation: Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1, enable TLS 1.2 and 1.3 only, remove weak cipher suites, obtain a certificate from a trusted CA, and enable HSTS with a min-age of at least 6 months.
